title: Old String & Tripwire Transparent Again!
description: Revert Tripwire to be invisible again, like in old versions!
body:
# Transparent Tripwires Again!

In Minecraft 26.1 Snapshot 3, Mojang changed tripwires to be translucent, which disturbs their primary usecase which is mostly to not be seen. Many players use tripwires to block off snow from falling, or placing carpets in the air, relying on the fact that they were basically invisible.

This pack reverts this change, keeping tripwires barely visible while not disturbing you.

![Comparison to Vanilla](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/wF5lBtiQ/images/e5ad452f503cf8d83bdc3b6bb92ec51c8a0175aa.png)
